provenance.source_citation: Indiana DOE, 'Exit Criteria for English Learners Guidance 2025-2026' (pub. Apr 2025); ESSA State Plan amendment approved summer 2024. Overall-composite auto-exit at 5.0. Per-grade Overall-composite cutscores (OLD WIDA scale, <= 2025) carried in SGP::SGPstateData[['WIDA_IN']].

targets.label: Proficient Cut
targets.provenance: Summative proficient cut; derived from cutscores + the achievement_levels proficient mask (basis=proficiency_boundary -- the scale score entering the first proficient level). No new numbers: the target inherits the sidecar cutscores provenance (currently PLACEHOLDER -- replace with official IDOE ILEARN cuts before any client-facing run).

targets.label: ELP Exit Target
targets.provenance: Indiana DOE, 'Exit Criteria for English Learners Guidance 2025-2026' (pub. Apr 2025); ESSA State Plan amendment approved summer 2024. Overall-composite auto-exit at 5.0. Per-grade Overall-composite cutscores (OLD WIDA scale, <= 2025) carried in SGP::SGPstateData[['WIDA_IN']].
targets.notes: Absolute auto-exit at Overall 5.0 (per-grade scale-score thresholds here). 4.3-4.9 Overall is a PROVISIONAL pathway: grade 3+ students with a Tier B/C score are eligible for ILP-committee additional-evidence review -- committee-mediated, not a pure scale-score cut, so not encoded as a target threshold. OLD WIDA scale (<= 2025); the July-2026 reset = a new sidecar.
